mapper.sql: select r.id, r.member_id, r.machine_id, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.total_minutes, r.total_amount, r.status, r.force_offline_time, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, m.name as member_name, mac.machine_no, mac.type as machine_type from netcafe_usage_record r left join netcafe_member m on r.member_id = m.id left join netcafe_machine mac on r.machine_id = mac.id
mapper.select: where r.machine_id = #{machineId} and r.status = '0' and r.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into netcafe_usage_record ( member_id, machine_id, start_time, status, remark, create_by, create_time )values( #{memberId}, #{machineId}, #{startTime}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.member_id, r.machine_id, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.total_minutes, r.total_amount, r.status, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, m.name as member_name, mac.machine_no, mac.type as machine_type FROM netcafe_usage_record r LEFT JOIN netcafe_member m ON r.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN netcafe_machine mac ON r.machine_id = mac.id WHERE r.status = '0' AND r.member_id IS NOT NULL AND r.force_offline_time IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, r.force_offline_time, NOW()) >= 5 AND r.del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE netcafe_usage_record SET force_offline_time = NULL, update_time = sysdate() WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status = '0' AND del_flag = '0'
